title: State of the World as Population Pyramids
description: Each chart is a population pyramid for one country. It has one layer for every age from 0 to 100. The diameter of each layer shows the population at that age.

contextualAttributes.comment: Interesting layout because they are spread on each row, but there are also multiple. The difference in rows doesn't seem to encode data however.
The lighting might be an interesting elements here, highlighting the shape of the pyramids.
